GM:(0,0,0)  A:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  M:(1/2,1/2,0)  R:(0,1/2,1/2)  RA:(1/2,0,-1/2)  X:(0,1/2,0)  XA:(1/2,0,0)  Z:(0,0,1/2)
